label: calculus
evidence: Mathlib/Analysis/Calculus (4084 decls) holds derivatives, Taylor series, MVT etc — the standard formal home of calculus.
verify_note: hierarchy ok (4084); Deriv/FDeriv/MeanValue/Taylor/LHopital on disk; QID=calculus; integrals sit in MeasureTheory

label: matrix theory
evidence: Mathlib/LinearAlgebra/Matrix (2465 decls) holds determinants, rank, eigenvalues, decompositions — core of matrix theory.
verify_note: hierarchy ok (2465); Determinant/Charpoly/Adjugate/Hermitian/GLn on disk; QID=matrix theory, part of linear algebra

label: matrix theory
evidence: Mathlib/Data/Matrix (919 decls) holds basic matrix definitions/operations complementing LinearAlgebra/Matrix.
verify_note: hierarchy ok (919); Basic/Block/Diagonal/Invertible all matrix defs; honest secondary container, medium conf apt

label: differential Galois theory
evidence: Mathlib/FieldTheory/Differential (26 decls) is the dedicated subfolder for differential fields/Galois theory, tighter than parent FieldTheory.
verify_note: hierarchy ok (26); Basic=diff fields/logDeriv, Liouville thm = core DGT material; no Picard-Vessiot yet; sole home

label: transcendental number theory
evidence: Mathlib/NumberTheory/Transcendental (81 decls) contains e/pi transcendence and Lindemann-Weierstrass — exact match.
verify_note: hierarchy ok (81); Liouville transcendence + L-W AnalyticalPart on disk; evidence overstates e/pi, container exact

label: p-adic analysis
evidence: Mathlib/NumberTheory/Padics (598 decls) contains p-adic numbers, valuations, p-adic norm/completions — the field's formal home.
verify_note: hierarchy ok (598); PadicNumbers/Integers/Norm, Hensel, MahlerBasis, C_p on disk; QID=p-adic analysis

label: tropical geometry
evidence: Mathlib/Algebra/Tropical (125 decls) implements the tropical semiring, the algebraic foundation of tropical geometry.
verify_note: hierarchy ok (125); folder=tropical semiring (Basic.lean), the field's algebra; sole tropical content, no varieties

label: geometry
evidence: Mathlib/Geometry (5456 decls) is the umbrella folder for Euclidean, manifold, convex, and group geometry; broad top-level container for the field.
verify_note: hierarchy ok (5456); Euclidean/Manifold/Convex/Group/RingedSpace; AG+AlgTop top-level elsewhere; best umbrella

label: trigonometry
evidence: Mathlib/Analysis/SpecialFunctions (4089 decls) contains sin/cos/tan and trig identities (Trigonometric subfolder), though the folder also covers exp/log/gamma etc.
verify_note: tighter path exists: SpecialFunctions/Trigonometric (1270 decls, Angle/Arctan/Chebyshev); parent mostly exp/log/gamma
